title: Rose Byrne's Oscar Nomination for If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
text: Rose Byrne received an Academy Award nomination for Best Lead Actress for her performance in A24's indie film If I Had Legs I'd Kick You. She competes alongside Kate Hudson, Emma Stone, Jessie Buckley, and Renate Reinsve. Byrne described the nomination as significant, stating she feels like she has snuck into the back of the bus and cannot believe they got into this extraordinary group of women. She emphasized the film's artistic merit, noting it represents a true artistic expression that feels surreal given its small scale. At the Golden Globes, Byrne mentioned that her partner Bobby Cannavale was absent because he attended a reptile expo in New Jersey to acquire a bearded dragon for their family. When asked about the pet's status, Byrne confirmed it is doing well for the kids. She indicated Cannavale plans to join her at the March Oscars ceremony. Prior to the Oscar nomination, Byrne won the National Board of Review Award and received nominations at the Critics Choice Awards, Independent Spirit Awards, and Gotham Awards.
